fields.description:
## Expected Behavior
`bash tests/plugin/test-audit-skill-resolution.sh` exits 0 with all sections passing when run in a shell where `CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT` is unset.

## Actual Behavior
Section C (--verbose flag shows per-command output) fails:
```
/home/user/digital-service-orchestra/plugins/dso/scripts/audit-skill-resolution.sh: line 34: CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT: unbound variable
```
4 of 6 assertions fail. PASSED: 2  FAILED: 4.

## Reproduction
- Unset `CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT`; run `bash tests/plugin/test-audit-skill-resolution.sh`.
- Pre-existing — fails on the pre-change tree (confirmed via `git stash` + re-run).

## Root Cause Hypothesis
`plugins/dso/scripts/audit-skill-resolution.sh` references `${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}` at line 34 under `set -u` without a default-substitution or fallback derivation.

## Fix Direction
Apply the `_PLUGIN_ROOT` resolution pattern (CLAUDE.md: 'Plugin path pattern') — derive root from `BASH_SOURCE` so the script works without the env var being pre-set.
